response:
<<The Palindrome of the Sky>>  
SELECT title, director  
FROM movies  
ORDER BY LENGTH(title) DESC, LENGTH(director) DESC;

This SQL query sorts the records in the `title` and `director` columns in descending order based on their character length. If two entries have the same length, they are ordered alphabetically (though the `DESC` clause ensures the default alphabetical order is used for ties).

A palindrome in the response is: **"Sky is blue"**.
